steps.title: Inspection Forms Tour
steps.text: The Inspection section holds three distinct log forms for physical visits, remote surveys, and mortality searches. All share a common layout but serve different operational purposes.

steps.title: Three Inspection Types
steps.text:
The three tabs at the top of the page are:
1. Site Inspection — log a physical visit to a sector
2. Bird Observation Survey — log a remote PTZ camera check
3. Mortality Search — log a search for birds trapped in mud or sand

Each has its own log table and entry form.

steps.title: Site Inspection
steps.text: Use this tab when a physical visit to a sector is performed or requested. Click the orange + icon to open the form. Completed forms appear as rows in the log table below.

steps.title: Bird Observation Survey
steps.text: Use this tab to log a remote check via a camera's PTZ function — no physical visit required. Useful for routine checks or when physical access is impractical.

steps.title: Mortality Search
steps.text: Use this tab to log a mortality search — a check for birds trapped in mud, sand, or similar hazards. If a search is needed or requested, it must be logged here.

steps.title: Common Form Fields
steps.text:
All three forms share common fields:
• Start / End time and supervisor details
• Weather conditions at time of inspection
• Cause of inspection (routine, incident response, follow-up)
• Photos and outcome notes
• Agricultural activity and deterrence measures in place

steps.title: Inspection Tour Complete ✓
steps.text: You now know how to log all three types of inspection. Continue to Utilities → Notifications to set up alerts for your team.
